title: Chrome Door Numbers Screw On 3 Inch Number 7 Door Number Elegant and Bold Door Numerals Suitable for All Door Types Including Wooden uPVC and Composite.
features: Package Include: These screw fix front door letters are 3 inches in height and designed in the classic Times New Roman font. They are available as a complete set of door numbers 0 – 9 and also in the letters A, B & C.

Beautiful Design: These door letters have been designed to leave the door with a smooth, clean and modern finish. The mirror polished look is elegant, stylish and clearly visible, ensuring your property stands out. It also makes it easier for visitors, the postal service and emergency services to find your property.

Quality Material: These high-quality front door letters are made from chrome finish stainless steel to ensure strength and durability. Each door number in the range has been salt spray tested for 2,000 hours and comes with an industry first lifetime coating guarantee. This means they will not pit, rust or corrode no matter what environment you put them in.

Easy Installation: They are extremely easy to fit, and each comes complete with two colour matched screws for perfect co-ordination on the door. They are compatible with most door types including wooden, uPVC and composite. Please refer to the images for product dimensions.
100% Satisfaction Guarantee : We are confident in our products. If you found any problem, please feel free to contact us, we will do our best to help you.
description: SISI UK is one of the leading manufacturers and suppliers of world-class quality hardware products in the UK. SISI UK Ltd is a family-run business that has been established for over 30 years. They are distributors of hardware, ironmongery, DIY, household, security, and pest control products. They are well known for their fast and professional service. These high-quality front door letters are made from chrome finish stainless steel to ensure strength and durability. Each door number in the range has been salt spray tested for 2,000 hours and comes with an industry first lifetime coating guarantee. This means they will not pit, rust or corrode no matter what environment you put them in.
